text: 1. Land NMP #2809: amend ADR-0075 so “diagnostic surface” is explicitly allowed while app/native surfaces still cannot expose Trellis types. [...] - **Phase A — ADR-0075 amendment** (#2809): define "diagnostic surface" vs "app surface," and update doctrine-lint plus the Trellis public-API leak ratchet (#2642) so the exemption is enforced mechanically, not case-by-case.
